objective: Implement a funded-lane OCR pipeline (via packages/runner with a hard fundedBudgetUsd cap) for cleared machine-print PD books, producing machine-readable text for downstream transcription and translation lanes, while never exceeding the task budget cap.
context: Some cleared PD books in LoC's collection would benefit from a high-quality OCR pass to produce machine-readable text for translation and structured data work. This is a funded-lane task running via packages/runner against donor funds, with a hard per-task budget cap that must never be exceeded. The donated lane never runs headless. Unscheduled backlog; the hard fundedBudgetUsd cap is an Elyos requirement for funded-lane tasks.
output: A funded-lane OCR pipeline (TypeScript, packages/runner) committed via PR, with budget enforcement and cost ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: The pipeline runs only via packages/runner and enforces the fundedBudgetUsd cap; it halts and logs if the cap is approached.
Input is restricted to items that have cleared the rights-gate with a complete provenance manifest.
OCR output is committed with its source item reference and provenance pointer.
No secrets, tokens, or API keys appear in logs, receipts, or committed files.
The pipeline never runs headless in the donated lane; funded-lane execution only.
A cost ledger entry is produced for each run recording actual spend vs cap.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
title: Funded-lane OCR pass for machine-print PD books (budget-capped)
